text.title: websocket-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for websocket-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Storing session tokens or JWTs in query string parameters of the WebSocket URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Query strings appear in server access logs and proxy logs; credentials leak immediately.

failure-mode.description: No rate limit per connection — one bad client consumes an entire CPU core.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: WebSocket message handlers run in the same event loop; a client flooding messages starves all other connections.
